---

Contains a list of all available table functions with their descriptions.

Columns:

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Name of a table function.
- `description` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Brief description of a table function.
- `allow_readonly` ([UInt8](/sql-reference/data-types/int-uint)) — Flag that indicated whether a readonly user may use this function.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->
